tasks.label: Create Conda Environment from environment.yml
tasks.detail: Creates a new Conda environment using the environment.yml file.

tasks.label: Activate Conda Environment
tasks.detail: Activates the specified Conda environment persistently in the terminal.

tasks.label: Update Conda Environment from environment.yml
tasks.detail: Updates the Conda environment to match the environment.yml file, removing unused dependencies.

tasks.label: Initialize and Push to GitHub
args: git init; git add .; git commit -m '${input:commitMessage}'; git remote add origin https://github.com/${input:githubUsername}/${input:repoName}.git; git push -u origin main
tasks.detail: Initializes Git, commits changes, sets the remote, and pushes the project to GitHub.

inputs.description: Enter the name of the Conda environment
